requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety and Installation Approval

summary.en: Azerbaijan BESS installations may require fire-safety review under local building, emergency, electrical-installation, and project-owner requirements. Review commonly focuses on container spacing, access, fire detection and alarm, suppression or mitigation design, ventilation, gas detection where relevant, emergency shutdown, thermal-runaway propagation controls, signage, and emergency response documentation.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆BESS安装可能须按当地建筑、应急、电气安装及项目业主要求接受消防安全审查。审查通常关注集装箱间距、通道、火灾探测和报警、灭火或缓解设计、通风、适用时的气体探测、紧急停机、热失控蔓延控制、标识和应急响应文件。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆BESS安裝可能須按當地建築、應急、電氣安裝及項目業主要求接受消防安全審查。審查通常關注集裝箱間距、通道、火災探測和報警、滅火或緩解設計、通風、適用時的氣體探測、緊急停機、熱失控蔓延控制、標識和應急響應文件。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan fire-safety and installation approval requirements for BESS sites
IEC 62933-5-2 safety considerations for grid-integrated electrical energy storage systems where specified
Project-specific fire-protection design, local permitting, insurer, and lender requirements

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project-specific fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These documents may support technical due diligence but do not replace Azerbaijan fire-authority, insurer, local permitting, lender, or project-owner expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目消防审查管理固定式储能安全。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代阿塞拜疆消防主管机关、保险方、当地许可、贷款方或项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目消防審查管理固定式儲能安全。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代亞塞拜疆消防主管機關、保險方、當地許可、貸款方或項目業主要求。

gap.en: A battery certificate or AZSTAND conformity file does not close the Azerbaijan installation fire-safety gap. Exporters should prepare site layouts, fire-protection drawings, thermal-runaway mitigation evidence, fire and gas detection logic where relevant, ventilation calculations, emergency shutdown logic, remote monitoring records, fire-load assumptions, maintenance plans, and Azerbaijani or accepted-language emergency procedures for the project owner and authorities.
gap.zh: 电池证书或AZSTAND合格评定文件不能覆盖阿塞拜疆安装消防安全差距。出口商应准备场地布置图、消防设计图、热失控缓解证据、适用时的火灾和气体探测逻辑、通风计算、紧急停机逻辑、远程监控记录、火荷载假设、维护计划和阿塞拜疆语或被接受语言的应急程序，供项目业主和主管机关审查。
gap.zht: 電池證書或AZSTAND合格評定文件不能覆蓋亞塞拜疆安裝消防安全差距。出口商應準備場地佈置圖、消防設計圖、熱失控緩解證據、適用時的火災和氣體探測邏輯、通風計算、緊急停機邏輯、遠端監控記錄、火荷載假設、維護計劃和亞塞拜疆語或被接受語言的應急程序，供項目業主和主管機關審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Azerbaijan installation, building, emergency, insurer, lender, or project-owner fire review applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AZSTAND or Chinese GB battery evidence is not enough for Azerbaijan BESS fire approval. Installation fire-safety review and project-specific mitigation evidence should be handled before shipment or site commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] AZSTAND或中国GB电池证据不足以覆盖阿塞拜疆BESS消防批准。出货或现场调试前，应处理安装消防安全审查和项目特定缓解证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] AZSTAND或中國GB電池證據不足以覆蓋亞塞拜疆BESS消防批准。出貨或現場調試前，應處理安裝消防安全審查和項目特定緩解證據。
